executives.name: Michael Sabel
executives.background: Michael Sabel is the Executive Co-Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Venture Global LNG. He has been a key figure in the company's development and strategic direction since its inception.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Co-Chairman and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Robert Pender
executives.background: Robert Pender is the Executive Co-Chairman of Venture Global LNG. He co-founded the company and previously served as Co-CEO alongside Michael Sabel.

executives.name: Jonathan Thier
executives.background: Jonathan Thier serves as the Chief Financial Officer of Venture Global LNG, overseeing the company's financial operations and capital markets activities.

executives.name: Brian Cothran
executives.background: Brian Cothran is the Chief Operating Officer of Venture Global LNG. He joined the company with extensive experience in the energy and industrial sectors, including roles at GE and Baker Hughes.

executives.name: Tom Earl
executives.background: Tom Earl is the Chief Commercial Officer of Venture Global LNG, responsible for the company's commercial strategy and LNG marketing.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Sabel
board_of_directors.background: Executive Co-Chairman and CEO of Venture Global LNG.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Pender
board_of_directors.background: Executive Co-Chairman and Co-Founder of Venture Global LNG.
